blocks.content: In this milestone, you select a service to instrument. For your first instrumentation, choose a service that's actively receiving HTTP traffic so you can see clear results.
Find a service that is actively receiving HTTP traffic. A web frontend, API service, or demo application works well.
Select the checkbox next to the service. For your first instrumentation, select just one service so you can clearly see the results.
> **Note:** A service needs HTTP traffic for Beyla to capture telemetry. If you instrument a service with no traffic, you won't see data.
In the next milestone, you'll configure instrumentation settings and enable telemetry capture.

---

### More to explore (optional)

At this point in your journey, you can explore the following paths:

- [Beyla supported protocols](https://grafana.com/docs/beyla/latest/configure/options/#supported-protocols)
- [Application observability activation](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/monitor-applications/application-observability/setup/)
